---
title: "Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: assignments
  sort: "date asc"
  fields: [title, date]
---

Welcome, I'm Denis 

---
title: "Portfolio"
---

## Course Lessons

- Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto
- Tidy Data
- Cleaning and Wrangling Data
- Data Visualization

## Assignments

- [Cleaning and Data Wrangling](assignments/a04.html)
- [Data Visualization](assignments/a05.html)
